description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season look.  Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features clutches with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season look.  Product Details Box clutch bag with a gold clasp Has a chain strap Has a fabric inner with a zipped pocket Material and Care Wood Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 10 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 5 cm
